title: Wallfences
description:
- Connects fences and walls 
- Improving completeness
body:
![Wallfences Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dbf9bf21302c9ab1b40a62d4ac20c9599f887d9.png)

**Wallfences** is a mod that, as the name suggests, allows **walls** and **fences** to connect. However, the mod doesn't stop there — it also adds new features, such as additional blocks in the **Calcite palette** and the **Tinted Glass Pane**.
There are many more blocks and mechanics included, all focusing on improving completeness and enhancing how **walls** and **fences** behave and interact.
